mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, order_no, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, quantity, unit_price, paid_amount, refundable_amount, after_sales_status, created_at, updated_at FROM trade_order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT id, order_id, order_no, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, quantity, unit_price, paid_amount, refundable_amount, after_sales_status, created_at, updated_at FROM trade_order_item WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT id, order_id, order_no, product_id, sku_id, product_name, sku_name, quantity, unit_price, paid_amount, refundable_amount, after_sales_status, created_at, updated_at FROM trade_order_item WHERE id = #{id}
